email_policy: Use only primary_email for founder identity. Ignore older or unknown Sami emails unless explicitly re-approved.
external_send_rule: Generate drafts only. Do not send, publish, book, charge, or mutate production without explicit approval for the exact action.
proof_rule: Use only real evidence from Dealix reports, GitHub, customer-approved proof, or public pages. Never invent client names, revenue, partnerships, or government access.
tone: direct, Saudi B2B, respectful, proof-first, low-pressure, practical
